div.span: CRITICAL: rooms are dirty but have arrivals expected TODAY.
DEPOSIT ALERT: upcoming bookings have unpaid deposits.
COMPLIANCE: guests are missing ID documents.
INVENTORY: rooms are Out of Order.

div.class: card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card h-100 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
heatmap-cell p-2 border rounded m-1 clickable-stat
alert alert-info py-2 px-3 m-1 d-flex align-items-center

tr.td: No data available for this period.

div.class: card luxury-card bg-danger text-white mb-4 clickable-card

div.p: Occupancy is pacing +15% for next weekend.
Increase ADR by 5 BD for Standard Rooms.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between mb-3 border-bottom pb-2 clickable-stat
d-flex justify-content-between mb-3 border-bottom pb-2 clickable-stat
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 clickable-card text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 text-center py-3
card luxury-card kpi-card mb-3 text-center py-3

div.p: Property is currently following ISO 9001:2015 based hotel operations. All sensitive bookings (Complimentary/House Use) require manager digital signature.

div.class: list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-0 bg-transparent
list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-0 bg-transparent
list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-0 bg-transparent

div.p: Quality metrics are calculated based on real-time operational timestamps. Any check-in delay over 15 minutes is flagged as an SLA breach.

div.class: card-header bg-gradient-gold text-charcoal d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2

span.t-att-class: msg.role === 'user' ? 'badge badge-dark p-2 text-wrap text-left' : 'badge badge-light p-2 text-wrap text-left border'

div.p: Ask me about occupancy, revenue, or guests.

button.class: btn btn-dark btn-lg rounded-circle shadow-lg chat-toggle-btn
